title: Fabrication, Inspection & Testing, Surface preparation and Painting of Flag Poles (50 m) – 2 Nos
content:
Project Name: Fabrication, Inspection & Testing, Surface preparation and Painting of Flag Poles (50 m) – 2 Nos.
Client: Trident Support Flag Poles LLC.
Project code: 4019014.
Description: Scope - Supply, Fabrication, Inspection & Testing, Surface preparation and Painting of Flag Poles (50 m) – 2 Nos.
Top Diameter of flagpole – 0.19 m & Bottom Diameter of flagpole – 0.940 m.
Location: UAE.
Field of activity: Manufacturing Works.
Status: Completed.
Duration: May 2019 – Aug 2019.
MO 304, Jebel Ali free Zone, Dubai, UAE
